# Theorem: Reputation Tokens Transfer Across Contexts

## Statement
If external actors treat a platform rank/badge as a legitimacy token \(L\), and \(L\) is a function of manipulable platform signal \(x\), then manipulating \(x\) can create downstream legitimacy \(D\):

\[
L = h(x), \quad D = q(L, z)
\]

If \(h(x+\delta)>h(x)\), then \(D\) may increase even outside the original platform.

## Relevance
Launch badges, chart positions, “#1 Product of the Day,” verified-looking review counts, and press logos can all travel as legitimacy tokens.
